spec_match.rationale: Directly investigates cross-boundary attribute inheritance for Shadow DOM, ensuring compliance with custom element shadow root propagation.

interactive.rationale: Extremely interactive host button toggles that instantly synchronize a visual tree comparison and update a live matrix audit table.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment, showcasing a critical developer topic for reusable web component authors.

edge_cases.rationale: Directly tests explicit overrides inside shadow trees vs global host controls.

references.rationale: Correctly references the ChromeStatus entry 5167534198292480 in the see also section.

design_system.rationale: Highly conformant visual layouts, distinguishing the shadow root boundary using dashed host elements and custom blue border wrappers.

summary: The shadow-dom-scope is an exceptional, high-fidelity developer resource mapping autocorrect attribute inheritance boundaries between light and shadow DOMs.
